landing.hero_body: Three statistical models — Dixon-Coles, ELO and Bayesian regression — running as an ensemble compute the real probability of every outcome. We highlight the matches with
landing.how_title: From raw data to a calibrated prediction in 3 steps.
landing.step1_desc: Historical xG, adjusted ELO, rest days, travel, expected lineup, knockout context. Trained on 14k matches.
landing.step2_desc: Dixon-Coles 15% · ELO 30% · Bayesian 55%. Weights optimised via walk-forward backtesting.
landing.step3_title: We compute the final probability of each match
landing.step3_desc: The ensemble produces the probability of win, draw, goals and more for each match. We highlight only the results with the highest statistical confidence.
landing.diff_title: What you won't find on generic sites.
landing.diff1_desc: Published models, visible calibration. Every prediction shows each model's contribution.
landing.diff2_desc: Brier score, calibration and hit rate by month. We show the bad months alongside the good.
landing.diff3_desc: When you visit a partner, we may earn a commission. But the ranking is the same for everyone — we use the same public feeds. No cherry-picking.
landing.diff4_desc: Conservative suggestions, an automatic 5% cap of your balance and alerts on risk patterns.
landing.faq1_q: Do you take money or run any operation?
landing.faq1_a: No. We don't take deposits or process payments. We're an information and statistical-analysis platform. Our revenue is 100% from user subscriptions.
landing.faq2_a: No, and anyone who promises that is lying. Predictions are probabilistic: accuracy shows over the long run, but short-term variance is total. We offer analysis, not certainty.
landing.faq3_a: Start conservative, with small fractions. With a R$500 balance, typical amounts are between R$5 and R$25 per match. Consistency is the only sustainable way.
landing.faq4_a: Because in most matches the probability is already clear. The highest-confidence highlights are the exception — on average 4-7 matches a day out of 30+ scheduled.
landing.referral_banner: {{sponsor}} is giving you 30 days free + {{discount}}% off permanently.

pricing.title: Pay for the
pricing.sub: Your subscription is the main revenue source. We also earn affiliate commissions when you visit a partner — but the ranking never changes because of it.
pricing.plan_free_tagline: For those who want to test the thesis before paying.
pricing.plan_founders_tagline: Lifetime access + private channel with the team.

footer.disclaimer: Predictions are probabilistic and don't guarantee results. Decide responsibly.

comparator.kpi_avg_spread_sub: gap between best and worst price
comparator.disclosure: Links to partners may be affiliate links. This never influences the data or the ranking — everything comes from the same public feeds for everyone.

wc.title: Simulated bracket
wc.champion_sub: Top {{count}} · light bar = reaches the semis · green bar = wins the tournament.
wc.methodology_body: We run 100k tournaments using ELO adjusted by confederation, home advantage, and squad ratings. Each percentage is the relative frequency at which the event occurred across the simulations.
